raw_cv_text:
Khadija Talon
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: khadija.talon@gmail.com | LinkedIn: khadija-talon | GitHub: KhadijaTalon | https://khadija-talon.dev
EDUCATION
University of Michigan | B.S. in Computer Science 2015 - 2019
Led the ACM Student Chapter's competitive programming team, achieving top 5 placement in 3 consecutive regional
contests with 150+ members mentored
Contributed to open-source Mozilla Firefox security project, authoring 8 code reviews and improving browser rendering
performance by 12%
Coursera & Stanford Advanced Studies | Graduate Specialization in Cloud Computing & Distributed 2020 - 2021
Systems
Completed advanced coursework on Kubernetes orchestration and microservices architecture with distinction
Implemented a Raft consensus algorithm project achieving 99.97% fault tolerance across distributed nodes
EXPERIENCE
Palantir Technologies | Senior Full Stack Engineer 2022 - Present
Architected and shipped a real-time data pipeline framework handling 2.5M+ events/second, improving data latency by
73% and enabling 15 enterprise clients to process 40% more data with same infrastructure
Led cross-functional migration of monolithic architecture to microservices reducing deployment time from 45 minutes to
8 minutes (82% improvement) and enabling 3x faster feature releases
Mentored 4 junior engineers on full-stack best practices, conducting weekly code reviews that reduced production bugs
by 58% quarter-over-quarter
Cloudflare | Senior Software Engineer, Platform 2020 - 2022
Designed and implemented a distributed cache invalidation system in Go reducing DNS query latency by 47% for 200K+
customer domains globally
Optimized GraphQL API resolver layer through intelligent batching and caching, decreasing frontend load times by 64%
and reducing database query volume by 51%
Drove adoption of infrastructure-as-code practices across 12 teams by authoring Terraform modules, reducing
infrastructure provisioning time by 55 hours per deployment cycle
Shopify | Full Stack Engineer, Fulfillment Platform 2018 - 2020
Built React-based merchant dashboard handling real-time inventory synchronization across 800+ warehouses, achieving
99.8% data consistency and supporting $1.2B in annual GMV
Engineered Kafka-powered event streaming system processing 500K+ fulfillment events daily, enabling 40+ downstream
services and reducing order processing latency by 35%
Implemented comprehensive integration test suite using Jest and Cypress covering 210 critical flows, catching 92% of
production issues before deployment
Figma | Full Stack Engineer, Infrastructure 2017 - 2018
Developed WebSocket multiplayer synchronization engine optimizing concurrent user handling from 50 to 500+
simultaneous editors per document with zero message loss
Contributed to performance initiatives reducing document load time by 52% through strategic caching and asset
optimization across 3M+ design files
Established monitoring dashboards and alerting using DataDog, reducing MTTR (Mean Time To Recovery) by 43% and
improving service reliability to 99.95%
PROJECTS
AsyncFlow | TypeScript, Node.js, React, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker 2022 - Present
Open-source workflow orchestration library enabling 3,500+ GitHub stars and 120+ enterprise deployments automating
complex asynchronous task chains
Implemented intelligent retry logic with exponential backoff and circuit breaker patterns reducing failed job retry count
by 68% and saving customers $400K+ in compute costs annually
MetricVault | Python, FastAPI, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Kubernetes, Grafana 2021 - 2023
Built high-performance time-series metrics aggregation platform processing 50M+ data points daily with single-digit
millisecond query latency serving 15+ B2B customers
Scaled database architecture from single-instance to distributed cluster setup handling 12x growth in query throughput
while maintaining sub-100ms p95 latency across all operations
SecureVault | Go, React, PostgreSQL, TLS/mTLS, AWS KMS 2020 - 2021
Created end-to-end encrypted secrets management system with role-based access control protecting sensitive credentials
for 25+ open-source projects and preventing 100% of unauthorized access attempts
Implemented AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit achieving SOC 2 Type II compliance and reducing
security audit findings by 87%
EXTRACURRICULAR
React London Meetup Community | Technical Lead & Speaker 2021 - Present
Organized monthly meetups attracting 200+ full-stack engineers and delivered 6 talks on distributed systems and
performance optimization reaching 5K+ online viewers
Mentored 12 junior developers transitioning into senior engineering roles, with 100% of mentees securing senior positions
within 18 months
HackTech Summit & Open Source Contributor | Hackathon Judge & Maintainer 2019 - Present
Judged 8 international hackathon events evaluating 500+ technical projects and contributed 47 merged pull requests to
Kubernetes ecosystem improving container orchestration reliability
Spoke at 3 technical conferences (ReactConf 2023, DevOps Days EU, Node Summit 2022) on microservices architecture
to audiences totaling 2,000+ engineers
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – TypeScript, Python, Java, Go, SQL, GraphQL
Technologies – React, Node.js, Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Elasticsearch,
Kafka
Tools – Git, GitHub Actions, Terraform, DataDog, Jenkins, Webpack, ESLint, Cypress, Jest, Postman
name: Khadija Talon
